docs.title: Welcome to My Digital Garden 🌿
docs.text: Hi there! I'm Ayodeji, and this is where I document my journey into web development, technical writing, and everything in between.

docs.title: 🚀 What I'm Working On
docs.text: Currently, I am building this site using MkDocs and the Material theme. I'm learning how to: * Deploy websites using GitHub Pages. * Manage code with Git. * Integrate interactive features like Giscus comments.

docs.title: 📖 Latest Posts
docs.text:
Check out my first thoughts here: * My First Blog Post

Feel free to leave a comment at the bottom of any post to say hi!
